title: Over 200 arrested in Delhi in pre-Holi crackdown
fullText:
College students celebrating Holi in New Delhi on Tuesday.
 | Photo Credit: Shashi Shekhar Kashyap
 The Delhi police on Tuesday arrested 204 people and took 973 others into preventive custody as part of ‘Operation Aaghat 4.0’, a drive undertaken to maintain law and order in the run-up to Holi.“Targeted checks were conducted against those involved in the sale of illicit liquor and drugs, and special scrutiny was undertaken of potential nuisance creators,” Sanjay Jain, Joint Commissioner of Police, Southern Range, told mediapersons. Published - March 04, 2026 01:00 am IST
